English: Guild Siege Application Refund
Traditional_Chinese: 申請公會戰未取得資格而退回的金額

English:
Hello, this is [Guild Siege Manager] Donaris.
Your Guild Siege application was unsuccessful, and the application fee has been refunded. Please note that a 2% commission has been deducted.
We hope to see you at the Guild Siege again.
Have a nice day!
Traditional_Chinese:
您好~我是 [公會戰管理員] 多拿里斯。
您的公會戰申請未取得資格，申請費已退還。請注意，我們將扣除 2% 的手續費。
我們期待您下次參加公會戰。
祝您有愉快的一天！
